title: Second Overworld
description: If you ever think one overworld isn't enough, this adds a dimension identical to the overworld.
body:
Have you ever wanted another overworld, in one world, for your other needs? Well, here you go.

How to make it

1. Build a frame using **OAK WOOD**, not logs or planks
![imagine this, but not lit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2657ce6e6834674788bef7167e2659d3c48bd66a.jpeg)

2. Now make the Dirt on a Stick to light the portal
![craft this btw](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4b82f0df4e7ddd996a0199b57ce892fd49f7040.png)

3. And now you can light the portal and enjoy another overworld!

Why would you need this? Well,


Want to blow up 5 megatons of tnt?
Use this mod.


Want to build 50 Walmarts per square kilometer, but you don't want Walmarts in your main world?
Use this mod.


There is so much you can do with this!

Feel free to add this mod to your modrinth modpack

Made by mautip for [Creamers Inc.](https://modrinth.com/organization/creamers-inc) <3
